entry.title: PipeVideo: A Pipeline for Video Generation with Autoregressive World Models
entry.summary: We study video generation and world model planning with an efficient pipeline.

entry.title: DreamWM: World Models for Controllable Video Generation
entry.summary: A new world model improves controllable video generation quality and temporal consistency.

entry.title: GaussianCity: 3DGS Reconstruction from Sparse Views
entry.summary: We present a 3DGS reconstruction system for urban scene capture from sparse-view images.

entry.title: NoiseBench: Benchmarking Diffusion Noise Schedules
entry.summary: This benchmark studies diffusion noise schedules without focusing on the target topics.
